call_sequence: UNKNOWN — selector recovery required before any call sequence can be specified
attacker_path_hypothesis.expected_gain: Up to $15,050,491 in ERC20 tokens if a public unguarded withdraw/sweep/claim selector exists — unconfirmed pending live context
preconditions: Contract holds $15M in ERC20 tokens (confirmed by tvl_usd=15050491)
At least one public selector exists that moves token balances (unconfirmed — requires bytecode recon)
No access control guard on that selector (unconfirmed — requires source or bytecode analysis)

live_context_required.command_or_source: cast code 0xa8acdd81f46633b69acb6ec5c16ee7e00cc8938d --rpc-url $BSC_RPC | python3 -c "import sys,re; b=sys.stdin.read().strip(); [print(b[i:i+8]) for i in range(2,len(b)-8,2) if re.match(r'[0-9a-f]{8}',b[i:i+8])]" | sort -u  # then resolve via https://www.4byte.directory/api/v1/signatures/?hex_signature=0x<selector>
live_context_required.name: bytecode_and_selector_recovery
live_context_required.reason: verified_source is null and no ABI exists. Without selectors there is no basis for any exploit hypothesis. Bytecode must be fetched and 4byte signatures recovered.

live_context_required.name: proxy_implementation_slots
live_context_required.reason: Contract may be an EIP-1967 transparent or UUPS proxy. If a recent implementation upgrade introduced a missing-access-control path, the live implementation address is the real audit target.

live_context_required.name: token_balance_breakdown
live_context_required.reason: The $15M is entirely token-denominated (token_usd drives tvl_usd; liquidity_usd=0, fdv_usd=0). Token identity (stablecoin, bluechip, or protocol token) determines whether the balance is real extractable value or an illiquid governance token.

live_context_required.name: deployer_and_creation_tx
live_context_required.reason: deployer_address is empty. The contract was discovered via erc20_transfer_log (token_funded_contract tag), meaning creation tx was not captured. Deployer identity is needed to check funding cluster links and prior project history.

live_context_required.name: funding_source_trace
live_context_required.reason: The balance spike was immediate and token-funded. The address(es) that sent the ERC20 tokens must be identified to determine whether this is a migrated custody contract, a rug redeploy, or a legitimate protocol treasury.

live_context_required.name: recent_transaction_calldata
live_context_required.reason: volume24h_usd=0 and no DEX activity, but the contract may have received internal calls or low-value probing transactions. Calldata patterns reveal whether any public selector has already been exercised.

live_context_required.name: verification_status_and_source
live_context_required.reason: unknown_verification_status tag means the enrichment pass could not confirm either way. BscScan source check may return partial or proxy-verified source that was missed.

expected_assertions: BLOCKED — cannot specify until a concrete value-moving path is identified
setup: Fork BSC at current block with --fork-url $BSC_RPC
Confirm token identities and balances at 0xa8acdd81f46633b69acb6ec5c16ee7e00cc8938d
Resolve proxy implementation if EIP-1967 slots are non-zero
transaction_sequence: BLOCKED — cannot specify until selectors are recovered and access control is assessed

source_or_selector_basis.evidence: verified_source=null, unknown_verification_status tag, no selectors recovered in brief
source_or_selector_basis.selector_or_function: unknown — no ABI or verified source
source_or_selector_basis.why_it_matters: Without at least one confirmed public selector that moves value, no exploit path can be constructed. This is the primary blocker for promotion to NEEDS_LOCAL_PROOF.

source_or_selector_basis.evidence: token_funded_contract tag confirms discovery via erc20_transfer_log; immediate_balance_spike and balance_spike tags confirm the funding was sudden and large
source_or_selector_basis.why_it_matters: The contract received $15M in tokens in a short window. If the contract exposes a public withdraw() or sweep() with no access control, the tokens are extractable by any caller.

suspected_exploit_families: unauthorized withdrawal, redeem, unstake, claim, liquidate, release, sweep, or migrate
missing access control on value-moving functions
proxy, implementation, or storage mismatch that exposes live funds
phantom accounting where shares, debt, or rewards are created without matching assets
why_this_target_matters: $15.05M in token value sits in a fresh, unidentified BSC contract with an immediate balance spike and no verified source, no deployer, no selectors, and no DEX activity. The token_funded_contract tag confirms the value arrived via ERC20 transfer, not native BNB. The combination of hidden_high_value_contract, audit_hidden_contract, and unknown_verification_status at this TVL level makes this a high-priority surface for unauthorized withdrawal or sweep if any public value-moving selector exists. No exploit hypothesis can be formed without bytecode, selectors, or token identity.
